description: Canonical list of Mustache-style placeholders used in templates. The wizard replaces them; /validate-setup blocks if any remain. Note: the in-place strategy and persona files (01-brand/personas.md, 02-strategy/objectifs.md, parcours-client.md, kpi-framework.md, channel-strategy.md, content-pillars.md) carry additional fine-grained interview slots (CIBLE_x, P1_*, SEUIL...) filled by /brand-discover Steps 5-6 — they are enumerated by the files themselves, not duplicated here. Entries with marker:true survive the wizard by design and are allow-listed in scripts/lint-placeholders.py.

identity.name: COMPANY_POSITIONING
identity.example: The first developer-first CI platform that scales from solo to enterprise.

identity.name: COMPANY_MISSION
identity.example: Empower every developer to ship with confidence

identity.name: COMPANY_VISION
identity.example: A world where shipping code is boring and boring means reliable

identity.name: EMAIL_CONTACT
identity.description: Public contact email shown in page footers and capture sections

visual_identity.name: BRAND_ILLUSTRATION_STYLE
visual_identity.example: Minimalist line art, isometric, no stock photos

visual_identity.name: BRAND_BANNED_VISUALS
visual_identity.example: stock office photos, handshakes, generic laptops, post-its

voice.name: BRAND_VOICE_POSITION
voice.example: Expert accessible: rigorous content, warm delivery

voice.name: BRAND_TAGLINES
voice.example: Ship faster, ship better. | Boring is the new exciting.

voice.name: TYPOGRAPHY_RULES
voice.example: No em dashes, single space after period

pillars_cadence.name: PILLAR_1
pillars_cadence.example: Data & Expertise (40%) — stats, benchmarks — LinkedIn, Blog

tracking_acquisition.name: GA4_MEASUREMENT_ID
tracking_acquisition.description: GA4 measurement ID (G-XXXX) injected in the gtag snippet of each landing page when web_analytics is enabled — filled per page, stays tokenized in the template gallery

tracking_acquisition.name: GA4_PROPERTY_ID
tracking_acquisition.description: GA4 property ID used by the reporting module snapshot (module reporting)

tracking_acquisition.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CUSTOMER_ID
tracking_acquisition.description: Google Ads account ID read by the mcp-google-ads server (module acquisition) — environment variable, see .env.example

tracking_acquisition.name: LEMLIST_SIGNUP_URL
tracking_acquisition.description: Public signup/booking URL inserted in Lemlist outreach sequences (module acquisition)

tracking_acquisition.name: CAMPAIGN_SLUG
tracking_acquisition.description: Campaign slug used in UTM naming patterns — resolved per campaign at production time

web_page_markers.name: FORM_ENDPOINT
web_page_markers.description: Form POST endpoint (n8n webhook or form service) — replaced when a gallery template is copied into a real page

web_page_markers.name: URL_CONFIDENTIALITE
web_page_markers.description: URL of the privacy policy page — replaced per copied page

web_page_markers.name: LIEN_CONFIDENTIALITE
web_page_markers.description: Anchor text of the privacy policy link

web_page_markers.name: MENTION_RGPD
web_page_markers.description: RGPD consent sentence next to capture forms
web_page_markers.example: En soumettant ce formulaire, vous acceptez notre

web_page_markers.name: URL_MENTIONS_LEGALES
web_page_markers.description: URL of the legal notice page — replaced per copied page

web_page_markers.name: URL_SITE
web_page_markers.description: Main site URL used in lead-magnet tool footers — replaced per copied page

web_page_markers.name: URL_ESSAI
web_page_markers.description: Trial/signup URL — replaced per copied page

web_page_markers.name: URL_ITINERAIRE
web_page_markers.description: Google Maps directions URL for the local one-pager — replaced per copied page

web_page_markers.name: CONCURRENT
web_page_markers.description: Competitor name in the vs-competitor landing template — replaced per comparison page

decks.name: DECK_TITLE
decks.description: Title for an individual deck — replaced when copying base.html into decks/

project_meta.name: TODO
project_meta.description: Temporary marker for gaps to fill later

project_meta.name: MOIS_ANNEE
project_meta.description: Runtime naming pattern — never substituted by the wizard (see tools-setup.md)

runtime_slots.name: DATE_LUNDI_ISO
runtime_slots.description: Monday date of the current calendar week — filled when a week section is created

runtime_slots.name: DATE_LUNDI_ISO_S1
runtime_slots.description: Monday date of the following week

runtime_slots.name: DATE_ISO
runtime_slots.description: Target publication date of a calendar entry — one per row, filled at planning time

runtime_slots.name: PILIER
runtime_slots.description: Content pillar of a calendar entry (one of content-pillars.md)

runtime_slots.name: EXEMPLE_SUJET_BACKLOG
runtime_slots.description: Demo row of the idea backlog — replaced by the first real idea

runtime_slots.name: DATE
runtime_slots.description: Date of a field signal — one per row, added at classification time

runtime_slots.name: IMPACT
runtime_slots.description: What the signal changes (persona, journey, objection...)

copy_templates_excluded_from_lint.name: SLUG_CAMPAGNE
copy_templates_excluded_from_lint.description: brief-campagne.md is a copy-template (never filled in place — see 02-strategy/briefs/README.md); the whole file is excluded from lint-placeholders.py along with its ~40 per-campaign slots

module_import_slots.name: ERROR_WORKFLOW_ID
module_import_slots.description: n8n error-handler workflow ID — filled at import into the user's n8n instance, never by the wizard

module_import_slots.name: N8N_CREDENTIAL_ID_LLM
module_import_slots.description: n8n credential ID — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: N8N_CREDENTIAL_ID_METRIQUES
module_import_slots.description: n8n credential ID — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: N8N_CREDENTIAL_ID_RECHERCHE
module_import_slots.description: n8n credential ID — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: N8N_CREDENTIAL_ID_SMTP
module_import_slots.description: n8n credential ID — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: NOTIFICATION_EMAIL
module_import_slots.description: Recipient of n8n error/report notifications — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: SENDER_EMAIL
module_import_slots.description: Sender address of n8n notifications — filled at workflow import

module_import_slots.name: VOTRE_DOMAINE
module_import_slots.description: Example slot in the n8n VPS install guide — filled by the user during installation

module_import_slots.name: NOM_DU_WORKFLOW
module_import_slots.description: rex-template.md is a copy-template — one REX per deployed workflow

module_import_slots.name: MOIS
module_import_slots.description: Month name in the monthly client notification — runtime slot

module_import_slots.name: POSTIZ_URL
module_import_slots.description: Postiz instance URL — env-level value referenced in ops docs
